name: Iron Bear Resources Ltd
analysis: IBR just fired a speculative volume-spike breakout — volume hit 3.3× its 20-day average as price broke out of its base. The breakout cleared a fresh 3-month high. The 9-SMA has reclaimed the 26 — short-term momentum is up. RSI has turned up through its signal line. These are high-risk speculative names — they move fast both ways, so size small and respect the stop. Trade idea: entry A$0.0760, stop A$0.0564, target A$0.1347 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
